title: Hornet Removal in Gramercy Park, Manhattan | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Gramercy Park, Manhattan. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Protecting historic homes & buildings. Call now!
intro: Gramercy Park's historic brownstones, pre-war buildings, and tree-lined streets create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, particularly during warmer months. Our expert hornet removal services protect residents and visitors in this exclusive Manhattan neighborhood from aggressive stinging insects. We provide safe, effective hornet nest elimination with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on nest size and location.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in hornet removal for Gramercy Park's unique architectural landscape, from private townhouses to co-op buildings surrounding the park. Our licensed technicians understand the area's historic preservation requirements and provide discreet, efficient service that respects your property and neighbors.
localContext: Gramercy Park's mature trees around the private park and Irving Place, along with ornate building facades and rooftop gardens, attract hornets seeking protected nesting sites. The neighborhood's blend of residential buildings, restaurants along Third Avenue, and proximity to Stuyvesant Square requires careful, professional pest control that minimizes disruption to this quiet, prestigious community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Gramercy Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service in Gramercy Park. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and accessibility. We understand the urgency of hornet infestations and prioritize rapid response for this densely populated Manhattan neighborhood.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of hornet removal in Gramercy Park?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal costs between $350-$550 based on nest location (ground level, upper floors, or rooftops), nest size, hornet species, and accessibility challenges unique to Gramercy Park's architecture. Multi-story brownstones or nests in difficult-to-reach areas may require specialized equipment, affecting the final price.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for Gramercy Park's historic buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal methods are completely safe for historic properties and residents. We use targeted treatments that eliminate hornets without damaging delicate architectural features, woodwork, or masonry common in Gramercy Park's pre-war and landmark buildings. All products are EPA-approved and applied by licensed professionals.

faqs.question: When is hornet season in Gramercy Park, Manhattan?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity in Gramercy Park peaks from late spring through early fall (May-October), with the most aggressive behavior occurring in late summer. Nests grow largest in August and September, making early detection and removal crucial. We recommend scheduling inspection if you notice increased hornet activity around your property or the park's perimeter.
